The '''Coruscant Full Symphony''' was a famous musical band during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
[[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] enjoyed this band and was often present at its concert during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial era]].<ref name="Handoff" />

Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[Offworld Special Events]] organized a concert in the [[Chibias/Legends|Chibias]] [[Chibias concert hall|concert hall]]. During the concert, Mara Jade rescued [[Zakarisz Ghent]] who had been arrested by two [[Security officer/Legends|security officers]].<ref name="Handoff" />
